requirements.title: 8-bit free-running counter
requirements.statement: An 8-bit counter (counter_q) shall increment by 1 on every rising clk edge, wrapping from 255 to 0, when rst_n is deasserted.

requirements.title: DUTY register write
requirements.statement: The DUTY register shall latch duty_in[7:0] on the rising clk edge when wr_en is asserted.

requirements.title: PWM output compare
requirements.statement: pwm_out shall be combinationally driven as 1 when counter_q < duty_reg, and 0 otherwise.

requirements.title: Reset clears all state
requirements.statement: On active-low reset (rst_n=0), counter_q and duty_reg shall clear to 0, producing pwm_out=0.
